feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: I ask for a wish , SLEEPY ANONS SLEEPING ANON Z______Z edition
entry.content: IN THIS THREAD, I SEARCH FOR ANYONE TO CAN GRANT MY WISH, AT ANY COST >also you can grant wishes or ask for your wish too you need to get in, especially those who can fulfill wishes >>>>>>>>>>REWARDS ARE GIVEN!<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<< Welcome >RULES 1. no overlewd the thread 2. if you are a wish granter, fullfil 1 wish at least 3. ask for a wish, at least 1 time 4. you cannot make wishes that prevent or modify someone else's wish. 5. smile 6. All Anons that need hugs shall receive hugs :) >video https:

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Sony is right
entry.content: Here's why Sony is making the right call overall: Physical media is old tech, just like CDs and DVDs. It was always going to disappear. However if Sony wants everyone to go fully digital, they need to let us actually transfer or sell games between accounts. Physical discs are done in 2028 and that’s fine but right now digital ownership still feels incomplete. Game sharing would be so much better without awkward Facebook Marketplace meetups or handing over your login on via a third party site I h

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Rest in piss.
entry.content: Rest in piss.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Okay, how expensive would be to make a 100 usd console using cheap hardware like…
entry.content: Okay, how expensive would be to make a 100 usd console using cheap hardware like a chromebook, add something like android and sell micro sd cardtridges that contain the physical data using a modern version of n64 cardtridges?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >we want to show that gaming is a serious artform I hate these insecure faggots …
entry.content: >we want to show that gaming is a serious artform I hate these insecure faggots so much. They need to add this reddit shit as a way to distance themselves from their work. Because they think doing something less realistic than the Titanic is embarrassing. Can we finally move away from self-aware writing forever?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I was thinking...since physical media is going to be nonexistent for ALL gaming …
entry.content: I was thinking...since physical media is going to be nonexistent for ALL gaming platforms soon... What exactly is stopping a new company from coming along and making a console that can publish and play physical games? All entertainment mediums eventually have something like this for enthusiasts...what's stopping this from happening with a gaming system? A gaming system where the whole selling point is that it can play physical copies of all modern 3rd party games? I mean if no gaming company is

entry.title: /b/ Random: Why do people say Chavs are dangerous?
entry.content: >Be me >Be the smaller kid, easily picked on >Chav lads in gold were consistently the ones to protect me from bullying >Chavs were really nice >Never had one bad experience with them and I live in a "chav ridden" city so I've had 20+ years of experience with chavs. >A random pair of chavs in their mid 20's/early 30's talked me out of suicide a few years ago >Not the first time Chavs have appeared out of nowhere to save me from some kind of crisis This is seriously the UK's most hated subculture?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: /WLB/ We Love Betty General #2
entry.content: Betty is an internet personality that first appeared on fishtank season 1. She is a very talented artist of the odd and bizarre. Unique and mysterious, this thread is dedicated to her honor. These are her socials x.com/BallerinaBitty kick.com/betty_fae etsy.com/shop/bettyfae/ News: Betty will be starting a new themed streaming schedule: White Trashed Wednesdays (be depressing and trashy *like me*) Freak off Fridays (diddy parties) Silly Sundays (???) Be sure to tune in at kick.com/betty_fae

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Pirates of the Caribbean discussion thread
entry.content: ">I am... Captain le quirk chungus Pirate man". Sparrow wouldn't have lasted beyond the arrest scene if he didn't have plot armour. Will Turner on the other hand would've survived the historical pirate era.

entry.title: /int/ International: Where all my LBC niggas at? I saw the Spain team running on the beach by Alamito…
entry.content: Where all my LBC niggas at? I saw the Spain team running on the beach by Alamitos on my way to work today and made sure to flip them all off and give them a couple "Viva Mexico, maricones". It was totally epic. Word on the street is those broke ass white boys are going to be hold up at a discount motel on Ocean Blvd, any fellow LBC niggas wanna meet up and make noise outside their motel until 4am?

entry.title: /mu/ Music: How to power through the cringe of your lyrics?
entry.content: I recently started writing music for fun, but I can barely get four lines into writing a song without reading it back and cringing to myself. How do I power through this?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >AIEEEEEEEE NOT MY PHYSICAL MEDIA NOT MY BLU RAYS HAVE MERC- Here's your physica…
entry.content: >AIEEEEEEEE NOT MY PHYSICAL MEDIA NOT MY BLU RAYS HAVE MERC- Here's your physical media. >b-but that doesn't cou- It's literally physical, and I can freely move it between PCs and play the same games fully offline. >b-but Stea- Goldberg emulator is easy to apply to your purchased games, and GOG installers are DRM-free. >b-but corrupt- So? Just keep backups. Why do consoletards keep whining about physical "going away" when PC has had it for decades?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Stay at home stewing in your own ennui. Eat the same old crap every day. Stay up…
entry.content: Stay at home stewing in your own ennui. Eat the same old crap every day. Stay up until 6 am shitposting until your back hurts and you develop a chronic health issue. Develop two. Vehemently oppose even the smallest issues which run counter-narrative to your own miniscule world view. Swill sugar-water while you mindlessly watch pointless slop, wasting what precious time you have left on this Earth as time races by faster and faster. Become a misanthrope.

entry.title: /int/ International: If you don't like seeing my threads, you can contribute to them stop appearing. …
entry.content: If you don't like seeing my threads, you can contribute to them stop appearing. By recommending me the best AI out there to buy subscription so I could chat with it about everything, about all my struggles. I am willing to pay up to 200$ a month to it if that stuff will be really good. I was thinking of purchasing Grok, but I think it fell off just like ChatGPT. I am tired of this loneliness and isolation. I need that AI thing to help me.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: BYD eclipses USA's best selling automaker
entry.content: https://www.bloomberg.com/news/arti cles/2026-07-01/byd-set-to-overtake -tesla-again-on-electric-car-sales >Way back in 2024, BYD beat Tesla for pure EV sales for the first time. The Chinese company has largely remained ahead of the American one, save for a dip in sales during the first quarter of 2026 — a dip large enough for Tesla to take the crown back. Now, though, it's looking like it'll go back to BYD. >The maker of the Dolphin delivered 557,090 battery-electric models in the three months

entry.title: /o/ Auto: GMT800 - worth the hype?
entry.content: Hey retards. Looking to get my retired father into a truck, because I think he's about taken advantage of. His 1996 F150 he bought new finally kicked the bucket. He apparently waltzed into a Ford dealership and was nearly roped into a F150 for 68k. He's so nice that people mistake him for being somewhat senile but luckily he managed to snake himself out the door without buying it that day. I've tried to convince him he doesn't need to spend that much for the truck he wants. Sure, it's his money
